title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.349 - Hispanic Heritage Month designated for September 15 to October 15
text:
9.349.  Hispanic Heritage Month designated for September 15 to October 15. — September fifteenth to October fifteenth each year shall be designated as "Hispanic Heritage Month" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities to recognize the generations of Hispanic Americans who have positively influenced and enriched our state and society.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
